Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Welcome, Commander! In this tutorial we will learn basic vessel controls, how to engage targets with guns and missiles, and how to launch and recover helicopters from a surface ship. You are in command of USS Gallery FFG-26, an Oliver Hazard Perry class frigate.
You can advance the tutorial at any time using the 'Back' and 'Next' buttons on this window.
You can recall this window at any time by opening the Event Log (at bottom right) and clicking on 'Open Free Content Window'.
